name: Possession
short_description: The story begins as the protagonist receives a cursed doll and starts suffering from recurring nightmares. Players explore dark environments and face fear through various horror elements. The game offers two different endings and delivers a short but intense horror experience.
detailed_description:
Story

The protagonist receives a possessed doll from an unknown sender and begins to suffer from recurring nightmares. This is a story about overcoming those terrifying experiences.

Features

  • A variety of effects and direction

  • Two different endings

  • First-person perspective (VHS style)

Content Warning

  • Blood

  • Sudden scares

  • Disturbing movements

(This game fully allows streaming, YouTube content creation, and monetization for both personal and commercial use.

You may freely use gameplay footage, create subtitles, and produce edited or transformative content without needing separate permission.

However, misuse such as misrepresentation, malicious distortion, or illegal purposes (e.g. hate speech or political propaganda) is strictly prohibited.)
